description: OLMo3 fused in-place RMSNorm for projected query and key tensors.
name: olmo3_dual_rms_norm
reference:
# Source: https://github.com/huggingface/transformers/blob/aad13b87ed59f2afcfaebc985f403301887a35fc/src/transformers/models/olmo3/modeling_olmo3.py#L179-L180
# Source: https://github.com/huggingface/transformers/blob/aad13b87ed59f2afcfaebc985f403301887a35fc/src/transformers/models/olmo3/modeling_olmo3.py#L55-L60
import torch

def run(q, k, q_weight, k_weight, eps):
    qf = q.to(torch.float32)
    kf = k.to(torch.float32)
    q_out = qf * torch.rsqrt((qf * qf).mean(-1, keepdim=True) + eps) * q_weight
    k_out = kf * torch.rsqrt((kf * kf).mean(-1, keepdim=True) + eps) * k_weight
    q.copy_(q_out.to(q.dtype))
    k.copy_(k_out.to(k.dtype))
    return q, k
